# sbproxy

> A high-performance reverse proxy and AI gateway in a single binary.

sbproxy sits between your clients and backends, providing authentication, caching, rate limiting, request/response transforms, load balancing, and AI model routing with zero external dependencies.

## Overview

- Single Go binary, sub-millisecond proxy overhead
- 103 native LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, and more)
- Path-based routing with hostname matching
- CEL expressions and Lua scripting for custom logic
- HTTP/3 with QUIC, WebSocket, and gRPC support
- Prometheus metrics and OpenTelemetry tracing
- Apache License 2.0

## Documentation

- [Manual](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/blob/main/docs/manual.md): Runtime reference, CLI flags, deployment, logging, metrics, TLS, health checks
- [Configuration](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/blob/main/docs/configuration.md): All config options with YAML examples
- [Architecture](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/blob/main/docs/architecture.md): Package layout, request pipeline, plugin system
- [Scripting](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/blob/main/docs/scripting.md): CEL and Lua reference with all context variables and functions
- [AI Gateway](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/blob/main/docs/ai-gateway.md): Provider setup, routing strategies, guardrails
- [Examples](https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/tree/main/examples): Ready-to-use configuration files

## Quick Start

Install:
```
go install github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy/cmd/sbproxy@latest
```

Minimal config (sb.yml):
```yaml
proxy:
  http_bind_port: 8080

origins:
  "api.example.com":
    action:
      type: proxy
      url: https://httpbin.org
```

Run:
```
sbproxy serve -f sb.yml
```

## AI Gateway

sbproxy provides a unified OpenAI-compatible API across all providers.

```yaml
proxy:
  http_bind_port: 8080

origins:
  "ai.example.com":
    action:
      type: ai_proxy
      providers:
        - name: openai
          api_key: ${OPENAI_API_KEY}
          models: [gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini]
        - name: anthropic
          api_key: ${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY}
          models: [claude-sonnet-4-20250514]
      default_model: gpt-4o-mini
      routing:
        strategy: fallback_chain
```

Routing strategies: round_robin, fallback_chain, cost, latency.

## Configuration Model

Top-level structure:
- `proxy:` - global settings (ports, TLS, ACME, timeouts)
- `origins:` - per-hostname routing rules

Each origin has:
- `action` - what to do (proxy, ai_proxy, static, redirect, echo, loadbalancer, websocket, grpc, mcp)
- `authentication` - who can access (api_key, basic_auth, jwt, oauth2, forward_auth, ip_filter)
- `policies` - rules and limits (rate_limiting, concurrency, expression, security_headers, cors, csrf, circuit_breaker)
- `response_cache` - HTTP response caching with TTL
- `request_modifiers` / `response_modifiers` - CEL or Lua scripts
- `transforms` - response body transforms (json, html, css)
- `forward_rules` - sub-route to different backends
- `variables` / `secrets` - template variables and vault-managed secrets
- `events` - subscriber configuration

## Scripting

Two engines:
- CEL (Common Expression Language): compiled, microsecond evaluation. Best for routing decisions and simple checks.
- Lua: interpreted, full scripting. Best for complex transformations.

Nine context namespaces available in both: request, session, origin, server, vars, features, client, ctx, response.

## Actions

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| proxy | Forward requests to an upstream URL |
| ai_proxy | Route across LLM providers with fallback and routing strategies |
| static | Serve files from a directory |
| redirect | Return HTTP redirects |
| echo | Return the request as JSON (debugging) |
| loadbalancer | Distribute traffic across backends |
| websocket | Proxy WebSocket connections |
| grpc | Proxy gRPC traffic |
| mcp | Model Context Protocol gateway |

## Authentication Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| api_key | Check X-API-Key header or query parameter |
| basic_auth | HTTP Basic authentication |
| jwt | JWT validation with JWKS endpoint |
| oauth2 | OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow |
| forward_auth | Delegate to external auth service |
| ip_filter | Whitelist/blacklist by IP or CIDR |

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/soapbucket/sbproxy
- Website: https://www.soapbucket.com
